message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

participant "Issuer" as Issuer
participant "Contract" as Contract

Issuer -> Contract: Revoke(h(Root_ct), reason)
activate Contract
Contract -> Contract: MarkCredentialAsRevoked(h(Root_ct))
deactivate Contract

Contract --> Contract: Event : CredentialRevoked(h(Root_ct), reason, timestamp)
activate Contract
deactivate Contract

@enduml
